docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY BISCHOFF, ELAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED WITH REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $88.93) SERVED DEC-13-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ELAYNE BISCHOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELLY BIELASKI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISCHOFF, ELAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIELASKI, KELLY $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $138.93 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,788.93, THE DEFENDANT WAS ONE OF THREE LANDLORDS IN A CONTRACTUAL SUBLEASE AGREEMENT WITH THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF GAVE DEFENDANT $1,650.00 IN SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT DIVIDED THE SECURITY DEPOSIT AMONGST THE OTHER TWO LANDLORDS. WHEN THE THREE LANDLORDS VACATED, NONE OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS RETURNED TO HER. PLAINTIFF IS DUE THE MONEY PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
